betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Secret plans, contingencies, backups, plots.
All the constructs of the mind who believes themselves in control.
And yet, reality, it throws a wrench in what we believed to be the perfectly-oiled machine of our lives.
The constructs of the mind, crashing down.
I was a liberator, a warrior of rigtheousness, fighting for order.
And then, within the span of a day, I was made to see who I really was.
I am of death. I am of sin. Literally, the Undead Lord of Gluttony.
The slap from reality, it did not care about my plots, my plans.
After having acted as the literal wrench in other's plots, my own plot comes unfolded.
The Crimson Emperor. The Meatball Man. The Soul Fiend and Twilight Demon. Xxeus.
Their plans, their plots, in the end, meant very little.
And mine too.
But thank goodness, that I realize this now.
No need for more subterfuge. No need for more lies.
I am of death, of of death I shall be. Inside and out.
And one day, soon, I shall scream it out loud, in the open!
